programme.title: The Gods Of Greece
programme.desc: The ancient Greeks built an empire that is considered the birthplace of Western Civilisation, and they credited their most monumental achievements to gods like Zeus, Apollo, and Poseidon.

programme.title: Fleeing Parchman
programme.desc: A man with aspirations to writing crime novels ends up the star of his own breakout story when he tries to escape from one of Mississippi's oldest and most notorious prison farms, Parchman Penitentiary.

programme.title: Hidden Giants
programme.desc: From a legendary city swallowed by the jungle to an underground metropolis stretching 18 levels deep and even a forgotten pyramid, sometimes the biggest mysteries on Earth are closer than we think.

programme.desc: Rachael makes a new version of sloppy joes, a quintessential family-favourite dinner, by adding pineapple, peppers and garlic and serving it on Hawaiian-style sweet buns.

Lau Pa Sat Satay Street, the Singapore version of Euljiro's beer alley: from skewers and beer to a variety of international cuisines, this place has it all. And of course the penalty game is a must!

The cooks are divided into four teams where they must compete in the famous MasterChef Team Relay, in a bid to create one tasty, cohesive plate of food - with only 30 seconds to handover between each leg!

programme.title: Annabel's Austrian Kaiserschmarren
programme.desc: Annabel is making a dessert called Kaiserschmarren served with blueberries and raspberries. Annabel wears a traditional dress and invites her friends to her Austrian chalet.

programme.desc: Seaweed is excited because today is THE BIG DAY, but he's forgotten what THE BIG DAY actually is. Can Captain Captain and Sandy help him remember?

programme.title: Sticky Gecko
programme.desc: Mum must get Bluey and Bingo out the door in time for a playdate, but they can't leave before they finish their game - waiting for a sticky rubber gecko to drop from the ceiling.

programme.title: Seesaw
programme.desc: Dad has rudely plonked himself on one end of the seesaw. So Bluey and Bingo round up the entire playground to help move him off, but they still need to find one more friend.

programme.title: Evil Pea's Party Plan
programme.desc: It's Evil Pea's birthday, but she and Carrot are trapped in the bottom of her freezer. They must put their differences aside and work together to escape.

programme.title: Footprints
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa‐Laa follow a trail of muddy footprints and find Po in bed with very muddy feet. The Noo-Noo cleans off the mud.

programme.title: Chicken
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'chicken' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of chickens - a brown chicken, a white chicken, a clucking chicken and some friendly chickens.

programme.title: UFO
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo only wanted to help fix a satellite dish with Mojo's chopper top. Now they've been mistaken for a UFO, and the whole town is in a tizzy about invading aliens!

programme.title: Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: The Love Badge

programme.title: Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Rainbow
programme.desc: After a rainbow appears over the Go Jet Academy, Glitch becomes fascinated with the legend of a pot of gold appearing at the end of it.

programme.title: Neighbours

programme.title: Grandad
programme.desc: Grandad is supposed to be resting, but when Bluey and Bingo go to visit him, he makes a run for it with the kids and takes them on a madcap adventure into the bush.

programme.title: Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: Andy and the Painted Dog Pups

programme.title: Star
programme.desc: Bella and Lift are visited by a shining star and set off to explore the floors of Playtime Towers. The first stop is Sketch in Boxtropolis - what will she be making today?

programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels help to put on an amateur dramatic show.

programme.desc: There has been a power cut and the squirrels use their torches to make shadows.

programme.title: The Collecting Badge

programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Squirrel Babies

programme.title: Grandad

programme.title: Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Dua Hati Sarangheyo To SarangBeo
programme.desc: Keni (Fendy Chow) is forced into an unusual disguise: he must pose as a Korean Idol to save a 'Meet and Greet' event organized by Erika. Reluctantly, Keni steps into the spotlight, leading to a series of comedic and high-pressure situations.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mba Mba, Bagi Tutornya Dong Suhu
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Jakarta, Tisa (Adzwa Aurell) is falsely accused of being a pickpocket by Dul (Cakrawala Airawan). Later, Tisa rescues Maya from thugs, and as a thank-you, Maya invites her to stay over. The next morning, Tisa is shocked to find that the grumpy Dul is actually Maya’s older brother.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Tuhan Ijinkan Aku Berjodoh Sama Cowok Lele
programme.desc: Indri (Chantiq Schagerl) dreams of winning a roller-skating competition, but her path takes a detour when she meets Jojo (Christ Laurent), a catfish farmer. Jojo is haunted by a past breakup, and Indri find herself entangled in a mission to help him find his true love once again.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Pesona Cowok Starboy Adalah Maut
programme.desc: What started as a fake romance turns into real feelings for Kevin (Kevin Hillers) and Indah. His ex, Liyan (Elina Joerg), refuses to accept the breakup and conspires with Andre (Rexy Rizky) to sabotage their relationship and make Indah hate Kevin.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: TENGKULAK KECE IDAMAN
programme.desc: Nadia (Debi Sagita) is rescued from thugs by Boni (Ridwan Ghani), though all of his medicines are destroyed in the scuffle. Impressed by his selfless care for the villagers, Nadia mistakenly believes Boni is a doctor. Touched by his kindness, she gifts him her late brother's unused car. Their bond deepens when Nadia chooses Boni's village as the subject for her university thesis.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: SURAT KALENG UNTUK MANTAN
programme.desc: Dito (Ridho Ilahi) and Dewi (Masayu Clara) fall in love, but their parents are at war: Dewi sells mung bean porridge while Dito sells chicken porridge. Their families want to marry them off to wealthy suitors, but the couple chooses to fight for their love, documenting their dreams and romance in letters hidden inside a tin can.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU

programme.title: Neng Ayam Sederhana Tapi Bikin Warga Nyaman
programme.desc: After his acting contract is terminated due to a scandal with a co-star, Fadi (Indra Evans) retreats to his mother’s village for a break. There, he meets Naura (Rachquel Nesia), a legendary 'poultry queen' who runs the most successful chicken and egg business in town.

programme.title: TAK ADA ROTAN RINDU MENJADI
programme.desc: Ridwan (Rendy Kjaernett) refuses to join his mother’s rattan business, choosing to work elsewhere. After a fierce argument with a naive village girl named Sumi (Faye Nicole Jones) at a bus terminal, fate intervenes when Sumi saves Ridwan’s mother. Impressed, his mother hires Sumi, forcing a reluctant Ridwan to work alongside the girl he once called a thief.

programme.title: The Secret Kingpin Behind Iran's Oil Empire
programme.desc: Bloomberg Investigates takes viewers on an immersive journey to the heart of our most powerful reporting. Each investigation is recounted by award-winning journalists.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Four female climbers face the sporting challenge of a lifetime as they attempt to compete in the first ever Olympic climbing competition at Tokyo 2020.

programme.title: Are Bots Killing Online Poker?
programme.desc: Computers have outplayed humans in chess and Go for decades. But poker was long considered unhackable-until bots from Russia and elsewhere got in the game.

programme.title: Meghan, the Duchess of Sussex
programme.desc: Meghan, the Duchess of Sussex, opens up in a wide-ranging interview with Emily Chang about life beyond the royal spotlight and her latest ventures in business and entertainment.

programme.title: Snap CEO Evan Spiegel
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Snap CEO Evan Spiegel in Los Angeles for a conversation about his entrepreneurial journey, building Snap and his latest consumer hardware bet.

programme.title: Reddit Co-Founder Alexis Ohanian
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Alexis Ohanian at Athlos NYC, an annual women's track and field event. They discuss his athletics portfolio, venture career and what really happened when he left Reddit.

programme.title: Reese Witherspoon
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Reese Witherspoon and the Hello Sunshine executive team to discuss the company's founding mission and what's next for Hollywood.

programme.title: Disney Entertainment Co-Chair Dana Walden
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Disney Entertainment Co-Chair Dana Walden and a cast of Disney stars for an inside look at the entertainment giant's global streaming and TV operations.

programme.title: Melinda French Gates
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Melinda French Gates in Seattle to discuss how she's navigating her next stage as a philanthropist and investor.

programme.title: Super Intelligence
programme.desc: Artificial intelligence has begun to exhibit early signs of agency. Are we on a path to superintelligence? Self destruction? Or is the potential promise and threat of AI being overblown?

programme.title: Animal Communication
programme.desc: Bioacoustics technology and AI are revealing how animals communicate, and may soon allow us to talk to them. What can we learn from wildlife, and should we be talking to the animals at all?

programme.title: Quantum Computing
programme.desc: With the promise of unimaginable computing power, a global race for quantum supremacy is raging. Who will be first to harness this new technological force, and what will they do with it?

programme.title: Water
programme.desc: Water. Our survival depends on water, yet global reserves are rapidly shrinking. Can technology help secure humanity's future water needs?

programme.title: Pain
programme.desc: For some, pain is excruciating and inescapable. But amid the continuing fallout of the opioid crisis, new technologies are being developed to limit and even eliminate pain.

programme.title: Next Billion
programme.desc: Soon, another billion people will be online. How will these new users embrace this technology to transform their lives, and what will it mean for the rest of the world?

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 银楼金粉
programme.desc: 广东佛山第一大银楼『尚银楼』面临生意危机，大老爷尚铿(秦沛)为取得沈家借贷，不惜与正室赛小蝶(薛家燕)施计强逼二少爷尚鋆(伍卫国)与沈家千金沈咏彤(杨婉仪)成亲，令鋆的意中人程秀杏(伍咏薇)一怒之下嫁入尚家做叁姨太。鋆从此与铿反目成仇，远渡重洋，兄弟不相往还。直至老太爷大寿那天，鋆始肯回家，但小儿子突遭绑架，铿不愿交出赎金，令兄弟再起冲突，鋆决意分家。_x000D__x000D_另方面，自鋆回来后，一直被铿冷落的杏面对着二叔深感痛苦，又被诬告害至四姨太霏霏(胡定欣)小产，杏痛定思痛向尚家进行报复，利用鋆之余情，暗中撩弄尚家上下，又揭发近身丫环秋菊(杨思琦)原是铿与有夫之妇留下的孽种，连串打击令一代豪门声名狼藉，万劫不复......

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: Family Matters
programme.desc: Tess is sent into a community skeptical of the police to discreetly investigate a local Church's potential links to human trafficking following the disappearance of the star soloist of the church's choir. programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: Siragadikka Aasai
programme.desc: Meena and Muthukumar, both carrying emotional baggage, struggle through challenges in their marriage due to their troubled backgrounds.

programme.title: Krrish 3

programme.title: Kaho Naa Pyar Hai
programme.desc: A young girl meets the doppelganger of her deceased boyfriend and now has a chance to find the people who have murdered him.2000 Release Year: 2000 Director: Rakesh Roshan

programme.title: Vedaa
programme.desc: Vedaa, a victim of caste discrimination, trains as a boxer under Abhimanyu and strives to seek justice for the murder of her siblings. Release Year: 2024 Director: Nikkhil Advani Awards: 2025 Winner Iconic- Powerpack Performance of the Year- Abhishek Banerjee

programme.title: Ajab Gazabb Love

programme.title: Sam Bahadur

Release Year: 2023 Director: Meghna Gulzar Awards: 2024 Winner Technical Award- Best Cinematography- Jay I. Patel

programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. This season features a refreshed lineup of hosts, bringing together the dynamic chemistry of Ayu Dewi, Gilang Dirga, Arie Kriting, Andhika Pratama, and Uus to lead the hunt for Indonesia’s next comedy star.

programme.title: Salfok Sama Neng Domba Satu Ini
programme.desc: Virza's restaurant went bankrupt because his regular sheep supplier was late in delivering meat for his restaurant. Sifa, the owner of the sheep farm, had to accept compensation by selling Virza's small shop. The two became closer, and Virza secretly developed feelings for Sifa.

programme.title: HOT SHOT
programme.desc: Program infotainment yang membahas kehidupan selebriti secara mendalam.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: Mantanan Sama Gue Mantenan Sama Dia, Chuaks
programme.desc: Tasya and Suji met in the park when they were both dumped by their boyfriends at the same time. The two became closer when Tasya asked Suji to pretend to be her boyfriend so that her ex would be jealous of her. Because they spent so much time together, their relationship became serious.

programme.title: THE SULTAN
programme.desc: The Sultan Empire is a grand talk show featuring 'King Sultan' Andre Taulany and 'Prince' Raffi Ahmad, accompanied by a hilarious squad of royal guards. With spectacular guest stars and non-stop entertainment, this is one regal spectacle you definitely don't want to miss!

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: JUARA INDONESIA RAMADHAN
programme.desc: "Juara Indonesia Ramadan" is a quiz show testing knowledge and agility in answering questions quickly and accurately.

programme.title: Cinta Kadang Gulali Ke Bawah Kadang Gulali Keatas
programme.desc: Ruby (Shanice Margaretha) has to replace her mother, who sells cotton candy in front of the school. While serving a girl, Ruby is accused by Angkasa (Fero Walandouw) of being part of a child abduction syndicate. Ruby refuses to accept such accusations and defends herself.

programme.title: Belum Mantan Masih Demen
programme.desc: Feeling abandoned by Sigit (Kiki Farrel) after seeing him post videos with a beautiful girl, Maya (Shanice Margaretha) decides enough is enough. She embarks on a mission to completely transform her appearance and behavior, determined to become the kind of woman who can capture the heart of any handsome man.

programme.title: INDONESIA FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Ketika Level Tertinggi Cinta Adalah Soto Ayam
programme.desc: Raga is a reckless 'eternal student' struggling to finally graduate after years of slacking off. His life takes a turn when he clashes with Alin, a hardworking girl who sells soto to pay for her tuition at the same campus. Their constant bickering draws everyone's attention, but beneath the friction, a deep romance begins to brew.

programme.title: Cantik Cantik Ora Ngapak Ora Kepenak
programme.desc: Ayu (Ika Diharjo) always speaks with a thick accent. While searching for her biological father, Ayu meets Beni (Masaji Wijayanto), who constantly criticizes her way of speaking.

His life takes a turn when he clashes with Alin, a hardworking girl who sells soto to pay for her tuition at the same campus. Their constant bickering draws everyone's attention, but beneath the friction, a deep romance begins to brew.

programme.title: Hot Tea Hot Tea Kalau Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Desperate for a solution, Zulfa and Kevin turn to a matchmaking agency, only to be betrayed by their respective partners. Since they both need a significant other to complete a mission, the agency suggests they team up and fake a relationship. However, the game changes when Kevin meets Zulfa’s mother, who happens to be a close friend of his own parents. Now, their mothers are joining forces to force them into a real marriage.

programme.title: Trio Baperan Kena Polusi Cinta
programme.desc: Three young men named Malik, Jajang, and Jarwo are hired to work at a company owned by a beautiful woman named Dina. All three seem to be smitten with their boss's charm. However, Malik, who is known as a playboy, secretly hurts Dina's younger sister, Monic. Dina, as the older sister, does not remain silent. She secretly takes revenge by making the three men fall in love with her and then ignoring their love.

programme.desc: When Danger Force leaves for an out-of-town mission, Ray calls on the Danger Force Clones for help. He quickly realizes that even though the clones look just like their superhero counterparts, they are very, very different.

programme.desc: When a suspicious new student shows up at school, Charlotte and Henry think he may be up to something. Captain Man goes undercover as a substitute teacher to learn more.

programme.title: Ship Wreckers / Writer's Retreat
programme.desc: Leni and Luna accidentally wreck Gramps boat when their small viewing party gets out of control. // Lucy struggles to come with ideas when she's given the opportunity to write an original story for the Royal Wood's Gazette.

programme.title: Gags To Riches / Sole Searching
programme.desc: After Luan pranks Grouse with a fake lottery ticket, she has to deal with the consequences of his massive shopping spree. // Lynn desperately searches for a popular brand of basketball shoes after she narrowly misses out on buying a pair.

programme.title: Broadcast Blues
programme.desc: The Action News Team has to cater to Chandler's demands after he buys the club new equipment.

programme.title: PL-1413 / In the Mood to Feud
programme.desc: Plankton travels two thousand years into the future and finds a few unfamiliar faces. // SpongeBob, Patrick, and Sandy find themselves in the middle of a long-standing feud between the Narwhals and the Planktons.

programme.title: High Sea Diving / Bottle Burglars
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants to be the first sponge to dive all the way up to the surface of the ocean! // When SpongeBob and Squidward accidentally let Plankton steal the secret formula, it's up to them to steal it back!

programme.title: Wiener Takes All
programme.desc: Tired of doing grunt work at the Krusty Krab, Squidward takes a new job as Manager of Weenie Hut Jr's.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Star-Robics / Who's the Dummy Now?
programme.desc: In this fitness variety show, Patrick learns how to exercise. // A family of dummies move into the Star home.

programme.title: Driven to Drive
programme.desc: In a Patrick Show episode about boats, Cecil teaches Patrick how to drive.

programme.title: Meet the Purrents / Apartment Complex
programme.desc: When Lori and Bobby find a kitten, they decide to coparent and swap the kitten back and forth between their homes. // After telling her family how great her apartment is, Lori unknowingly entices her sisters to secretly take over her space.

programme.title: Roadie to Nowhere / A Fridge Too Far
programme.desc: After learning that Chunk was like her in high school, Luna worries her ambition to be a rocker is unrealistic. // When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.title: Selfie Improvement / No Place Like Homeschool
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. // Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: City Slickers / Fool Me Twice
programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city. Lori struggles to be a city girl and Lincoln finds Ronnie Anne has changed. // The family has a new plan to dodge Luan's April Fool's Day pranking: stunt doubles

programme.title: Date Night / Behind the Jingle
programme.desc: Will and Min's date ends up in a rideshare turf war. At home, Halmoni throws a party as the kids try to prove they can watch themselves. // The family gets famous after their Groom & Board Jingle hits #1. But fame is fickle and tears them apart.

programme.title: The Three Ravens
programme.desc: Ellie & the kids investigate cryptic Mrs. Withers. When Jack goes missing in her creepy home, Ellie and Lil must save him!

programme.title: Mutiny on the Krusty / The Whole Tooth
programme.desc: When a storm sweeps the Krusty Krab away, its crew and customers will need a crazed Krabs to lead them back home. // Patrick's last baby tooth needs to come out, but he's afraid to let it go.

programme.title: Karen's Baby
programme.desc: Karen quickly learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Jeers for Fears / Tea Tale Heart
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to The Royal Woods House of Terror, Linc and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears. // Lola discovers Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it - no matter what Lucy says.

programme.title: The Loudest Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Faced with spending Thanksgiving apart, Lori and Bobby try to bring their crazy families together for the first time.

programme.title: Kernet of Truth
programme.desc: Lincoln and the Middle School Action News Team solve the mystery of the missing popcorn.

programme.title: Just a Little Pipe Problem / Camp Chuck
programme.desc: The Groom & Board gets a surprise inspection, but the broken pipe Jack and Lil neglected to fix might ruin them all. // Chuck's got a new hustle: theatre camp! Jack & Lil are sure it's a scam. But there's more to the chaotic show than they realized.

programme.title: A Midsummer Night's Scheme
programme.desc: Max agrees to mentor Captain Perfect's younger sister, who is headed down the path of becoming a supervillain. But he has his hands full when she tries to become one of Mastermind's henchmen. Phoebe tries to help BC ask Chloe to the school dance.

programme.title: Brawl In The Hall
programme.desc: When Charlotte is challenged to a fight at school, Captain Man and Kid Danger step in to try and help Charlotte defend herself.

programme.title: iHurt Lewbert
programme.desc: A 'Messing With Lewbert' sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly's obnoxious doorman. The gang nurses him back to health until Freddie's mother steps in and takes over. When a romance starts to blossom they have to stop it.

programme.title: Tori the Zombie
programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.title: Lay Lay's Little Little
programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are assigned a shared Little Buddy, Milaena, they spend the week attempting to create a mini-Sadie and mini-Lay Lay, or "Say Lay", instead of learning about what Milaena likes and what makes her unique.

programme.title: Bye, Bye, Birthday / Tough Guise
programme.desc: Tired of the yearly cheer surrounding her birthday, Lucy casts a spell so her family will forget what day it is. // When Zach is given detention, Rusty and the rest of their friends try to toughen up him up so he'll fit in.

programme.title: House Music / A Novel Idea
programme.desc: Lincoln signs his family up for a talent show and they form a band. // It's Dad's annual Take Your Daughter to Work Day so Mom offers to take Lincoln to her work: a dental office.

programme.title: Prison Break / Canyon Valley Film Festival
programme.desc: When Jack and Lil are grounded by Will and Min, who are then grounded by Halmoni, the family team up to escape their punishment. // Canyon Valley hosts a festival and Jack's excited to enter, until the pressure to deliver a masterpiece gets to him.

programme.title: Wiener Takes All / Stuck in an Elevator
programme.desc: Tired of doing grunt work at the Krusty Krab, Squidward takes a new job as Manager of Weenie Hut Jr's. // Squidward gets trapped in an elevator with SpongeBob and Patrick on his way to return a nearly overdue library book.

programme.title: Pat-per Route / Day of the Dartfish
programme.desc: Patrick helps Squidward with his newspaper delivery job to compensate for injuring him. // In the midst of a typical day of scavenging, the Dartfish family discovers a thief in the Star home.

programme.title: Who's a Big Boy?
programme.desc: Patrick hits an unnatural growth spurt in his late adolescence.

programme.title: Save the Last Pants / A Stella Performance
programme.desc: Rusty tries to bring the fun of Gus's to Duds For Dudes when he's in charge of the store. // Stella wins a school competition and is super excited - until she learns she has to give a public presentation.

programme.title: Hiccups and Downs / The Loathe Boat
programme.desc: Luna needs to get rid of a nasty case of the hiccups before a big rock competition. // The Morticians Club plan Bertrand's escape from the cruise ship his parents work on.

programme.title: Just a Little Pipe Problem / Camp Chuck
programme.desc: The Groom & Board gets a surprise inspection, but the broken pipe Jack and Lil neglected to fix might ruin them all. // Chuck's got a new hustle: theatre camp! Jack & Lil are sure it's a scam. But there's more to the chaotic show than they realized.

programme.title: Sad, Single, and Stranded / A Waste of a Perfect Summer Day
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find "the big picture" as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: The Fishbowl / Married to Money
programme.desc: Sandy tries to study SpongeBob and Patrick's behavior, but her science experiment goes horribly awry. // Mr. Krabs takes Plankton's advice, and finally marries the only thing he ever loved...money!

programme.title: Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: School of Shock
programme.desc: Lisa takes over her first-grade classroom and learns that there's more to teaching than just knowing facts.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: 艳阳天
programme.desc: 钢琴师李燕南与乐队指挥女儿陈小芸相爱，常指点她歌唱技巧。小芸在一次代替演出中一鸣惊人，得团主及花花公子杜邦杰力捧。小芸赴星马演出，心却惦念燕南，一夜与杜邦杰于车内发生争执，怎料汽车失事...

programme.title: 宋宫秘史
programme.desc: 包公发现刘妃在二十年前为保其位而谋害李妃，将李妃刚诞下的儿子调走后，把她逐出皇宫。于是，包公用妙计诱大太监郭槐认罪，揭发当年他与刘妃合谋陷害李妃之奸计，并将刘妃定罪。而李妃也被接回皇宫，与已为皇帝的儿子团聚。

programme.title: 快活林
programme.desc: 武松杀死潘金莲及西门庆后，被判发配孟州牢营。武松元照例要接受一百下杀威棒，但得施恩求情，侥幸获得豁免。武松为报答施恩，当知道她的「快活林」酒家被「蒋门神」蒋忠夺去，誓要不惜一切助她取回酒家。

programme.title: 铁扇公主
programme.desc: 一段紧张奇情的取西经故事，由孙悟空师徒行经火焰山，大战铁扇公主，白骨精及其妹妹展开。

programme.title: 流星蝴蝶剑
programme.desc: 这部武侠传奇故事，集合瑰丽的画面、诡秘悬疑、权力斗争及动作于一身，成功地将精彩的动作场面与紧凑的剧情结合。藉江湖两大帮会内部叛变，从而刻划出人性叵测及真善混淆的一面。

programme.title: 老夫子奇趣录
programme.desc: 电影承上集继续笑料百出。这次，大蕃薯开了一家中医诊所，但传统的中医似乎不为时髦的香港社会接受。最后得靠好友老夫子相助，为他解决疑难！

programme.title: 黑灵官
programme.desc: 人称「黑灵官」的宫天龙，押解杀人犯关云飞时遇上大风雪，被迫在宫天龙家留宿。当晚关云飞获同伙所救，逃脱前更砍杀宫天龙之母及幼妹。其后，宫天龙因押解囚犯不利，被打入大牢。宫天龙出狱后，誓要杀死关云飞为家人报仇。

programme.title: 貂蝉
programme.desc: 汉朝末年太师董卓霸道专横，弄权祸国，忠臣王允誓要利用貂蝉的美色设计除掉董卓。王允得知董卓的义子吕布见貂蝉貌若天仙一见钟情，于是将计就计把貂蝉献给董卓为妾，终使父子反目。吕布最后杀了父亲董卓，自此与貂蝉成为眷属。

programme.title: 六指琴魔
programme.desc: 女侠风灵得悉"六弦魔琴"重现江湖，唯一能克制魔琴的只有火弦弓及火羽箭，唯袖手樵隐知其下落；风找得群雄一起找樵；期间，众人发现逍遥隐士就是六指琴魔...

programme.title: 鬼新娘
programme.desc: 七十年代偶像巨星邢慧和杨帆带来的惊悚片，提醒您千万别娶被附身的女人为妻，她绝对不会放过您！剧中的女鬼生前被叔叔奸杀，现在要借用邢慧的身体报仇！

programme.title: 冷血十三鹰
programme.desc: 铁船帮杀手戚明星决意要逃离帮会后，遭其帮会杀手追杀，幸得侠士卓一帆所救，才幸免于难。其后卓一帆意外发现戚明星竟是其杀妻仇人，但在得悉戚明星对此愧疚不已后，饶恕他的过犯。最终两人惺惺相惜，决定联手击败铁船帮.

programme.title: 倾国倾城
programme.desc: 李翰祥史诗式电影，艺术成就及导演功力震惊中港台三地。本片荣获金马优等剧情片、最佳女主角及最佳彩色影片美术设计奖项。影后卢燕饰慈禧太后；处女演出即成名的萧瑶，饰死后受追封为贵妃的珍妃；而为珍妃逝世而不近女色的光绪帝则是狄龙。

programme.title: 断魂谷
programme.desc: 断魂谷赵家庄主赵云阳有两弟子，赵玉龙和赵剑英。玉龙终年浪荡江湖，却得云阳所有财产。剑英不愤，害死师父嫁祸玉龙，幷引其子金虎追杀玉龙。两人在断魂谷决斗，剑英欲收渔人之利，幸金虎和玉龙发现谷中有埋伏，诈伤引出主谋，连手反攻...

programme.title: Day 3 Session 2 Tie 3: Denmark vs Sweden (C1)
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】启澄履任主席当日，已打算辞退一妍，一妍以放假为由暂时度过危机。一妍与AKL银行新任总裁戴德桥见面，提出惊人的合作建议。国际刑警指，坠机事件很可能不是意外。明塱集团爆出丑闻，股价大跌，同时遭到AKL银行催逼还款。启澄被迫将持有的股份「以股抵债」，AKL银行不费吹灰之力就成了大股东之一。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 基俊与慧云婚期已定，基俊前女友许安妮声称怀有基俊骨肉；慧云没动摇，仍要与基俊结婚。安妮被家人强制送回外国，满月设法助她逃脱时遇上成风，二人联手帮安妮举行记招公开怀孕一事，却遭昊天阻挠。成风事败向老板卓世祺汇报，世祺再作盘算。成风好奇满月为何与蒋家作对，满月避而不谈。哲贤助手邝文海对满月起疑，命莫振强追查。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍成功进入董事会之外，路沙马集团主席方欣亦成为新董事；方欣更直接向一妍宣战。一妍再次要求以珈、丽雪入董事会，惟以珈仍坚决拒绝。明塱医院爆出医疗事故，丽雪的弟弟陈宇泽牵涉其中。丽雪帮忙拆局时，发现事件背后大有文章……以珈心系继女王海淳的前途，希望海淳按照启聪遗愿，前赴英国升读大学，但海淳坚拒不从，二人闹翻。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 樊如晦试图陷害叶凌霜，但叶凌霜机智应对，反使樊如晦计划落空。同时，彧修明利用叶凌霜的才智，成功让樊如晦填补国库的空缺。在夜北，七海伶和界诸婴回到部落，却接到彧修明的赐婚圣旨，引发族人的误解和不满。另一方面，冷天曦在月圆之夜受月噬影响失控，叶凌霜采取放血的方法帮助她缓解疼痛。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: The Chair Museum / The Legend of Crackerfoot
programme.desc: Archibald's plan to help Sage recover his beloved rocking chair hits a snag. Archibald and his siblings scour the woods for the legendary Crackerfoot.

programme.title: The Case Of The Knocked Down Fences
programme.desc: While Hoof is about to do his obstacle course, he finds all the fences knocked down. He blames Bling, who was jealous of the lucky wings he wears on his hoofs, but Bling assures she's got nothing to do with it ! Noddy investigates to settle their argument.

programme.title: The Case Of The Unfinished Building
programme.desc: Strange accidents keep happening on the building site. Clockwork Mouse is convinced that someone is trying to stop them finishing the building. Noddy investigates and finds out things aren't quite as they seem...

programme.title: The Case Of The Damaged Magic Box
programme.desc: Pat-Pat is doing a magic show but she discovers her magic box is broken. Noddy investigates: Who broke the magic box? He needs to find out soon so that Pat Pat's show can take place.

programme.title: The Case Of The Lost Pirates
programme.desc: Armed with a brand new sat-nav from Fuse, the Pirates head off on The Pirate Challenge, sailing all around Toyland. But when they fail to arrive at their first stop in Toy Green, Noddy investigates what's happened. He must set the Pirates back on course to complete the challenge by the end of the day.

programme.title: Why Warthog Is Ugly
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Warthog was really rather handsome. And did he know it! He strutted around Tinga Tinga as if he owned the place. All the animals were fed up with Warthog's boasting, and then one day Lion decided to give chase. Yikes! Warthog ran headfirst into Porcupines burrow! After that, he was no longer the prettiest beast in Tinga Tinga. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Why Owls Head Turns All The Way Round
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Owl's head didn't turn all the way round. She had tiny little eyes and tiny little ears, and she found it very hard to stay awake. Then one day all the Mangoes started disappearing in Tinga Tinga. Against all the animals better judgement, Owl was ordered to watch over the Mango tree … but the mangoes kept disappearing.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Bouncing Bulb
programme.desc: Pat's Special Delivery is a very large, very fragile lighthouse bulb, and everything seems to be conspiring to make him break it! Falling timber, an out of control sofa, Bonnie the dog, high winds...! Pat's journey from the sorting office to Pencaster Bay is a minefield of hazards. Waiting for the bulb is lighthouse keeper Chris Beacon and his pet parrot Micawber, both anxious to get the lighthouse working before sundown, and tracking a storm blowing in.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Lost Pigeon
programme.desc: The Thompson's family pigeon, Cedric, has been reported found in Northern Ireland. Pat must take Dorothy and Bill to help bring him back in the SDS Plane. Meanwhile Alf camps out at the sorting office, pining for his beloved Cedric's return. Once in Ireland, Pat meets the man who found Cedric and Dorothy manages to charm him down from his roof. Unfortunately an inopportune phone call from Alf startles cedric and causes him to take up a roost on a cliff face with a friendly puffin.

programme.title: Marsha Wonderful Life
programme.desc: Marsha overhears the others saying she is too bossy. She decides that Silver hatch would be a better place without her. Chaos swiftly ensues, can Marsha be persuaded to stay, they can't cope without her!

programme.title: Let's Hear It For Big Chris
programme.desc: Big Chris is working on Loada while the others plan a surprise evening for him for being the longest serving member of Silver hatch

programme.title: Funny Business
programme.desc: Big Chris receives a mysterious parcel… the cars are intrigued to find out what is in it. Strange and silly things start happening at the workshop, could it have anything to do with Big Chris' package?

programme.title: Nick Solves The Case
programme.desc: PC Pete has been summonsed to get to the bottom of some missing fuel. But where's Nick? And who can solve the case?

programme.title: The Case Of The Messed-Up Painting
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings has done a beautiful painting to use in her Story-Time afternoon. But then Coco and Noddy discover it ruined! Coco thinks that Bling must have done it but she protests her innocence. Noddy investigates: who messed up the Queen's painting - and can he get it fixed again in time? Keep investigating, Noddy!

programme.title: The Case Of The Deltoid's Challenge
programme.desc: Deltoid accepts the Ninja's challenge to run around the loop-theloop. But when he fails on his first attempt, he feels ready to give up in despair. Noddy investigates: How can he help Deltoid do his challenge?

programme.title: The Case Of The Knights On Patrol
programme.desc: The Knights set off on their patrol but are delayed by someone playing tricks on them. Noddy investigates: who's playing tricks on the Knights? He soon finds them in Fable Forest, waylaid by yet another cheeky trick. Noddy will have to find the culprit before the Knights end up in serious trouble!

programme.title: The Case Of The Delayed Repairs
programme.desc: The railway tracks are being repaired all over Toyland by the Builders, so Farmer Tom, Tractor and a trailer are running a replacement service. But the repairs take longer than expected when the Builders' tools go missing. Noddy investigates, and finds that Cloppycorn loved the trailer rides so much that he hid the biolders' tools in a basket that Pat-Pat had asked him to take to the other Naughticorns.

programme.title: Dollhouse Fairy Tales
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Happy CAT-O-Ween
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Mecha-Menace
programme.desc: Magnus and Axel unveil their new "mechano-dragon." It's impressive at first, but the Riders set out to prove it's no better than a bucket of bolts.

programme.title: Summer Holiday
programme.desc: In need of some rest and relaxation, the Riders head out on vacation. But their supposedly perfect island getaway isn't quite what they hoped for.

programme.title: That Stinking Feeling / Go for The Gold
programme.desc: When Donna is dog sitting but unable to sleep due to barking, TZG secretly stops a skunk from sneaking into her yard at night and riling the pooch. / When an inexperienced Rona takes over as chairman of the Founder’s Day Celebration, TZG secretly helps ensure the traditional festivities run smoothly.

programme.title: Tooth on the Loose / That Thing You Dew
programme.desc: When Phoebe convinces the Tooth Fairy to visit before Marcus has actually lost his tooth, the Dew Drops do everything in their power to make sure the tooth is out before she arrives! / The Dews decide to hold a concert in the park for their animal friends, but can’t find the time to practice.

programme.title: The Case Of The Messed-Up Painting
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings has done a beautiful painting to use in her Story-Time afternoon. But then Coco and Noddy discover it ruined! Coco thinks that Bling must have done it but she protests her innocence. Noddy investigates: who messed up the Queen's painting - and can he get it fixed again in time? Keep investigating, Noddy!

programme.title: The Case Of The Deltoid's Challenge
programme.desc: Deltoid accepts the Ninja's challenge to run around the loop-theloop. But when he fails on his first attempt, he feels ready to give up in despair. Noddy investigates: How can he help Deltoid do his challenge?

programme.title: The Case Of The Knights On Patrol
programme.desc: The Knights set off on their patrol but are delayed by someone playing tricks on them. Noddy investigates: who's playing tricks on the Knights? He soon finds them in Fable Forest, waylaid by yet another cheeky trick. Noddy will have to find the culprit before the Knights end up in serious trouble!

programme.title: The Case Of The Delayed Repairs
programme.desc: The railway tracks are being repaired all over Toyland by the Builders, so Farmer Tom, Tractor and a trailer are running a replacement service. But the repairs take longer than expected when the Builders' tools go missing. Noddy investigates, and finds that Cloppycorn loved the trailer rides so much that he hid the biolders' tools in a basket that Pat-Pat had asked him to take to the other Naughticorns.

programme.title: Fluffy Flufferton
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Cakey’s Cupcake Cousins
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Spinny Water / Kelp's Song
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Kelp saves them all using his unicorn spark to create bubbles he attaches to seaweed. / Kelp helps his unicorn friends create music with their horns and pieces of nature. Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Playground / Sparkless
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s "fun-crastinating" puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Happy Birthday Pawston
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch embark on a road trip to Chew York City to track down Kelly Korgi to ask her to perform at Pawston’s 100th birthday party.\ When Kelly Korgi tells Tag she can’t perform at Pawston’s 100th birthday party, she and Scooch decide to create a Kelly Korgi replacement so that she doesn’t break her promise to the town.

programme.title: Big Dog Job / The Case of the Slobbery
programme.desc: Tag tries to prove to Mom that she’s a big dog by puppysitting Yip and Rhonda all day. All she has to do is get them to the playground, but the pups keep running off. \ When a giant, bone-shaped, roller coaster ride goes missing from the Amusement Bark, Detectives Tag and Scooch take on the case of the slobbery robbery.

programme.title: Sandstorm
programme.desc: The Dinotrux get caught in a powerful sandstorm that stops them in their tracks, which leaves Ty Rux and the Reptools to find a way to save them.

programme.title: Race To The Finish Part 1
programme.desc: The girls get summer jobs to help Lucky repair the sprawling house she inherited from her grandfather near the Rosemead Valley Racetrack.

programme.title: To Squawk With Love / Lerk Was The Night
programme.desc: Eep & Thunk cheer up Squawk to avoid the first final exam/Eep and Lerk venture to the Garden of Eaten after the Broods spike the Watering Hole

programme.title: The Flawed Couple/ Go-Sip Girl
programme.desc: To learn about jobs, Grug assigns kids to the first "shadowing"/Ugga mistakenly creates the first gossip to impress the "nitting" club

programme.title: Big Man On Berk
programme.desc: Thinking he's allergic to Meatlug, Fishlegs gets hypnotized - and wakes up transformed into an invincible warrior known as Thor Bonecrusher.

programme.title: Gone Gustav Gone
programme.desc: When Dagur the Deranged captures Gustav, it's up to Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders to get him back.

programme.title: Slow Boat to England
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: The Knight's Fall - Part 1
programme.desc: Po and Blade rush to warn the Emperor about the weasels, but he has Po arrested and Colin captures Blade, revealing that she was never a knight. Thrown in a cell, Po reunites with Rukhmini and Mr. Ping, and he copes with the truth about Blade as they break out. Po fights Klaus and Veruca but is outmatched. Blade defeats Colin and hurries to help Po but is too late.

programme.title: It's Purrsday!
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Doodlebook
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Dollhouse Safari
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: P.U.
programme.desc: Boss Baby must "de-stink" Simmons after a misfire of Stinkless Serum, and Tim & Danny try to upgrade their small- scale taxi business

programme.title: Hush, Little Baby
programme.desc: When Frederic Estes tries to get babies banned from the local library, the babies fight back in a war for story time

programme.title: Night of the Frodarg
programme.desc: On a dark and stormy night, Tim's fears of a local legend and Boss Baby's fear of a PuppyCo agent force the brothers to unite to stay safe as the house is infiltrated

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Shadowy Syndrome of the Sinister Splotch
programme.desc: Captain Underpants becomes a wanted man in underwear when footage surfaces of a robber who looks exactly like him. George and Harold, positive it's an impostor, try to track down the perp and bring him to justice. But can the boys do this before Captain Underpants is found guilty?

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Bizarre Blitzkrieg of the Bothersome Butt-erflies
programme.desc: As a prank, George and Harold use Melvin's new animal hybrid invention to create a creature that's a cross between a butt and a fly. But some of the monster butt-erflies want to eat everything in sight- including the students hiding out in the school gym!

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Problematic Pandemonium of the Punishing Plungerina
programme.desc: After helping George and Harold make a comic featuring the heroine Plungerina, Erica asserts that Plungerina could be better that Captain Underpants. To prove her wrong, the boys decide to actually create the villain in the comic and then have Captain Underpants save the day. Unfortunately, Krupp - and therefore Captain Underpants - is away at a principals' convention.There's no one to save them...until a real life Plungerina saves tthe day! But who is really Plungerina?

programme.title: Combustion
programme.desc: Tony is convinced that Layla is deep undercover and tries to talk to her alone to get through to her. Meanwhile, the crew investigates the gang’s production of the mysterious formula from the tattoo. When Frostee discovers that the product of the formula is unstable and will explode, Tony has to save Layla, who is driving a whole truck of it!

programme.title: Driving Blind
programme.desc: Now broken out of mind control, Layla goes undercover with the gang, hiding the fact that she’s no longer being controlled. The crew is shocked to discover that revered martyr Rafaela Moreno is still alive and is the mastermind behind the mind control plot. Rafaela puts Layla’s driving to the test in a wild race against a mystery driver, then takes the rest of the crew hostage just days before Rafaela's dastardly plot.

programme.title: An Echo of Nowhere
programme.desc: Now in Rafaela’s custody, the crew works together to break Echo out to retrieve the hauler. Echo makes it into the jungle and must battle a mind-controlled Ms. Nowhere using everything she’s learned about spying and survival from the very woman who's out to get her. Meanwhile, Rafaela enlists Frostee to help her develop a non-exploding version of the mind control formula before her plan goes into motion at the favela race.

programme.title: The Longest Day
programme.desc: During the week of the Midnight Sun where the sun doesn't set for a week, Hiccup must deal with sleep deprivation and a dangerous new dragon.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Hiccup and the Riders, with help from Dagur hatch a plan to steal Berk's gold back.

programme.title: Out Of The Frying Pan
programme.desc: When the Eruptodon can't take its egg into the Great Volcano, Hiccup and Fishlegs must go into the dangerous volcano with the egg before it's too late.

programme.title: The Oath
programme.desc: The Trollhunters race to stop Gunmar from acquiring a powerful relic, and Jim must do the unthinkable to stop him!

programme.title: For The Glory Of Merlin
programme.desc: Team Trollhunter discovers a surprising ally while trapped in a flooding tavern!

programme.title: In Good Hands
programme.desc: When the new exchange students come to town, the kids are stopped from running an imperative errand.

programme.title: The Knight’s Code
programme.desc: Po and Blade's personalities clash as they track Klaus and Veruca and fight off some of Po's old foes. Blade gets to see Po's kung fu mastery, but doesn't agree to team up with him until she realizes that he accidentally holds the key to finding Klaus and Veruca: he has a piece of the WuGao Gauntlet. Meanwhile, Klaus and Veruca continue on their path of destruction while looking for the mysterious "Lotus".

programme.title: The Lotus
programme.desc: Po's moral lines are blurred when he and Blade have to break an untrustworthy hedgehog monk (Zhen) out of jail to get more information on what Klaus and Veruca stole from the Lotus. They learn from Zhen that there are in fact three more weapons, and Po recognizes one of them from a comic book.

programme.title: The Legend of Master Long-Tooth
programme.desc: Po and Blade must convince a deceased comic book writer's son to give them information about an unreleased comic that may point them toward the next weapon: a whip of fire. However, after the events of 103 Po is now a wanted criminal, so the Emperor's Forbidden Company arrives and captures him. Torn between saving Po and the mission she's sworn to complete, Blade flees and abandons Po.

programme.title: Asteroid Rage
programme.desc: With an asteroid hurdling toward Earth, threatening to destroy Arcadia Oaks, Aja and Krel must join forces with Area 49-B -- Colonel Kubritz and Tronos -- to stop it. These strange bedfellows might save the town, but this alliance comes at a cost.

programme.title: Lugg's Day Out
programme.desc: Krel finally gets the wormhole generator working, only for Luug to eat it! The Royals race to catch their teleporting pup before their secret alien identities are uncovered. But the chase for Luug uncovers something far worse… Morando is on Earth.

programme.title: The Fall of House Tarron
programme.desc: When General Morando and Colonel Kubritz attack the Mothership, Team Tarron must fight to protect the King and Queen’s Cores and their lives… with shocking, fatal results.

programme.title: Dollhouse Safari
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Abra-CAT-Dabra
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Easter Kitty Bunny
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Dollhouse Detectives
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Mission to CATurn
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Why Monkeys Swing In The Trees
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Monkey used to play on the ground and he loved to wind up Crocodile. One day the Big Rains came and Monkey got stranded up the Mango Tree. Nasty Crocodile promised to take him to dry land…. But only in exchange for one thing…. His HEART! Monkey tricked Crocodile and when Crocodile found out that Monkey swapped his heart for a measley mango, he chased Monkey up a tree.

programme.title: Why Tickbird Sits On Hippos Back
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Tickbird didn't sit on Hippo's back, infact they weren't friends at all! Tickbird was sick of Hippo splashing all the time. One day tiny Tickbird challenges big Hippo to a contest… who can drink the most water in a single gulp! Tickbird outwits Hippo by using the tides and from that day she is allowed to sit on Hippo's back and pick off all the yummy ticks she can eat! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Runaway Bath
programme.desc: Pat must deliver an old bath tub to Pencaster Lighthouse. But when he goes to collect it from Thompson Ground, the bath ends up rolling away into Greendale with Jess inside! When Pat catches up with the bath he finds PC Selby about to impound it for being an un-road-worthy vehicle. Pat explains it's a Special Delivery and at last gets on his way.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: Mrs Goggins is on holiday, so Sarah Gilbertson is looking after her dog Bonnie. She calls in on Pat and proves she has zero control over the dog. But there is only time for Jess to roll his eyes before Pat is called out on a special delivery - it's urgent! He has to deliver the RADARSCOPE (designed by Ted) to Mrs Goggins, who is up in Scotland! Pat has no idea what a radarscope is and neither does Ben. But they know what urgent means, so they spring into action and load it into Pat's jet plane.

programme.title: Simply The Best
programme.desc: Molecom is very grateful to Plugger for rescuing him after yet another of Flash's pranks. But Plugger is soon frustrated by Molecom's attempts to help… Meanwhile, Roary is trying hard to beat his best lap time.

programme.title: Cici Wins The Day
programme.desc: Cici is fed up with never winning and decides not to take part in the race that day. Can Roary persuade her to change her mind?

programme.title: Heavy Loader
programme.desc: Roary takes Loada on a jaunt to the beach… only to discover that sand and lorries don't mix too well!

programme.title: Testing Time For Maxi
programme.desc: PC Pete and Nick are up at Silver hatch giving the cars their road tests. Is Maxi really going to be as good as he says he is or will he be unpleasantly surprised?

programme.title: The Case Of The Pocket's Present
programme.desc: Fuse asks Noddy to take a present to the Pockets. But when Noddy arrives at the Treehouse, he discovers he's carrying an empty box. The present, whatever it was, has gone! Noddy must investigate: where is the Pockets' present? But how will he ever find it when he doesn't actually know what it is? It's going to take all his detecting skills to solve this one!

programme.title: The Case Of Fuse's New Game
programme.desc: When Fuse invites his friends to come for a playdate all they want to do is play his new computer game. But then suddenly the computer goes off. He soon discovers there's a power cut affecting the whole of Brickabuild. But who switched off the power? And why? Desperate to carry on with the game, Noddy decides to investigate: how can they play Fuse's new game?

programme.title: The Case of the Pirate's Treasure
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings asks the Pirate Captain to do the first dance with her at the Queen's Dance. But when it's time to practise, the Captain can't come: someone's stolen their treasure! Noddy decides to help find the treasure so the Captain will still be able to dance. He needs to investigate: Who stole the Pirates' treasure?

programme.title: The Case Of The Empty Store
programme.desc: Clockwork Mouse leaves Carlton in charge of getting everything ready for the Builders' Parade. Carlton gratefully accepts Noddy's offer of help but doesn't want the Naughticorns helping too! But when Carlton goes to the Brickabuild Store for supplies, he's horrified to discover the store is empty. How will they get the parade ready now? And will Clockwork Mouse ever trust Carlton again? Noddy sets out to investigate: Who took all the stuff from the Brickabuild Store?

programme.title: A Cat-Tabulous Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Fluffy Flufferton
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Treasure Riders
programme.desc: When a swashbuckling adventurer named Waldondo comes to town, the Riders enthusiastically join him on a treasure hunt for a priceless gem.

programme.title: Puff Enuf
programme.desc: The Riders find a Puffertail and train her to join the family. She struggles to learn but soon finds herself with a chance to make a big rescue.

programme.title: Welcome to Harmony Harbor
programme.desc: Ari moves in to Harmony Harbor, but notices something strange involving a group of kids, a Noodle Truck chef and her pet squirrel. / After Ari discovers the secret of Team Zenko Go, he asks to join the crew. But first he must learn the importance of teamwork.

programme.title: Where’s The Party? / The Noisiest Night
programme.desc: When Marcus loses an invitation to a birthday party and doesn’t know where it will take place, the Dew Drops set out to find the location and get Marcus to the party on time. / When Harper can’t sleep because of a strange noise in her room, the Dews must figure out the source.

programme.title: The Case Of The Pocket's Present
programme.desc: Fuse asks Noddy to take a present to the Pockets. But when Noddy arrives at the Treehouse, he discovers he's carrying an empty box. The present, whatever it was, has gone! Noddy must investigate: where is the Pockets' present? But how will he ever find it when he doesn't actually know what it is? It's going to take all his detecting skills to solve this one!
