programme.desc: When Fuse invites his friends to come for a playdate all they want to do is play his new computer game. But then suddenly the computer goes off. He soon discovers there's a power cut affecting the whole of Brickabuild. But who switched off the power? And why? Desperate to carry on with the game, Noddy decides to investigate: how can they play Fuse's new game?

programme.title: The Case of the Pirate's Treasure
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings asks the Pirate Captain to do the first dance with her at the Queen's Dance. But when it's time to practise, the Captain can't come: someone's stolen their treasure! Noddy decides to help find the treasure so the Captain will still be able to dance. He needs to investigate: Who stole the Pirates' treasure?

programme.title: The Case Of The Empty Store
programme.desc: Clockwork Mouse leaves Carlton in charge of getting everything ready for the Builders' Parade. Carlton gratefully accepts Noddy's offer of help but doesn't want the Naughticorns helping too! But when Carlton goes to the Brickabuild Store for supplies, he's horrified to discover the store is empty. How will they get the parade ready now? And will Clockwork Mouse ever trust Carlton again? Noddy sets out to investigate: Who took all the stuff from the Brickabuild Store?

programme.title: Gabby, I Shrunk the Kitties!
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: It's Purrsday!
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Mom’s Birthday / Angry
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop enlist Cruz’s help to perform a dance for Mom’s birthday. Though it’s hard at first, they learn to put their dolphin, unicorn, and narwhal powers together to create something special. / Kelp, Pixie, Ollie, and their friend Leroy try to help Juniper understand her angry feelings.

programme.title: Tuskist / Three Moon Festival
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first "tuskist" appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Tag Team / Cattitude Adjustment
programme.desc: With a new family moving to town, Mayor Sniffington wants Pawston to look perfect. Tag and Scooch offer to help, but it's too many chores to do on their own, so Tag builds a robot to help. But when Frank and Beans catch wind of the robot, they try to swipe it so that it will do their personal chores. \ When Tag learns that Pawston's new fire chief is a cat, she leads a welcoming effort with the dogs of Pawston.

programme.title: Hocus Pocus / Furricane
programme.desc: When Tag and Scooch get a once-in-a-lifetime chance to learn magic from Muttfield, Tag cannot wait to be the star of the end-of-class show. When Scooch outshines Tag with his natural gift for magic, Tag gets jealous and attempts a master level trick that goes awry. \ The dogs are shedding their winter coats and it's the day of the big Pawston Picnic.

programme.title: Fake Ravine
programme.desc: When the Dinotrux settle together in the crater, D-Structs decides to go after their most important resource: the Reptools.

programme.title: Race To The Finish Part 2
programme.desc: Determined to save her family home, Lucky signs up to race as a wild card in Rosemead's elite Junior Cup. But winning it all won't be easy.

programme.title: Munk History / Happy Howl Day
programme.desc: Grug tries to solve the mystery of where Munk's family is /Eep refuses to join in when Ahhh! Valley celebrates their first holiday, "Howl Day"

programme.title: Snooty And The Beasts Part 1 & 2
programme.desc: After rescuing Kevin and almost having a first kiss, Eep sets up dangerous situations to recreate the moment; Grug and Snoot go on a rescue/mission

programme.title: Reign Of Fireworms
programme.desc: Fireworms invade Dragon's Edge, while Ruffnut and Tuffnut discover that they have an unexpected connection to the island.

programme.title: Crushing It
programme.desc: As a Rumblehorn wreaks havoc on Dragon's Edge, Hiccup seeks the help of Stoick - who forms an unexpected bond with the rampaging beast.

programme.title: The Knight's Fall - Part 2
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade’s life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: The Liar and The Thief
programme.desc: The team arrives in India where an old friend of Rukhmini can supposedly give them a pendant that will lead to the next Tianshang weapon. But when they arrive, they find that Rukhmini’s hometown has changed a lot in the thirty years she’s been gone, and her old friend Diya might not be willing to help them.

programme.title: Abra-CAT-Dabra
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Easter Kitty Bunny
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Dollhouse Detectives
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Fugitive's Day Out
programme.desc: Boss Baby is framed for leaking info about the Stinkless Serum to PuppyCo and must flee on the run via Errand Day with the family

programme.title: El Apasionado Negocio de la Niñera
programme.desc: Frederic makes a play to take over the town's babysitters by instituting "senior sitting"

programme.title: Plushythingy
programme.desc: When Frederic Estes creates the cutest plushy ever that is the hottest toy in town, the field team must destroy the last remaining one but are powerless against its cuteness

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Bombastic Blathering of Brainy Blabulous
programme.desc: When Krupp transfers to another school, George and Harold follow, only to find a bizarro version of Jerome Horwitz Elementary, where the teachers are nice and the kids are well-behaved. But no one's having any fun! George and Harold want to right this wrong with pranks and comics. But Krupp enlists Mr. Neamer (bizarro Meaner), who then super-enlargers his brain and becomes Brainy Blabulous, in order to stop the subversion of authority.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Crazy Caustic Spray of the Contagious Cruelius Sneezer
programme.desc: In order to spice up their field trip to Romeinday (an ancient Rome reenactment park), George and Harold trick Melvin into turning the bus into a time machine so they can travel to actual ancient Rome and be gladiators. After offending Caesar with their comic, the emperor is accidentally turned into Cruelius Sneezer and pursues the school group with all his might.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Trashy Tale of the Tumultuous Tubbadump
programme.desc: In honor of Dump Day in Piqua- celebrating the creation of the dump - George and Harold try to earn extra credit by creating a trash-alanche. But Melvin creates an invention to suck all the trash into another dimension. The plan backfires when Tubbadump, a trash-covered monster, emerges from that dimension for revenge on the trashmakers.

programme.title: The Patroness
programme.desc: Echo and Ms. Nowhere bust Cisco, Frostee, and Gary out of their cell. But Rafaela has already mind controlled Tony and Layla and taken them to drive for her in the favela race, allowing her to release her mind control formula on the crowd!

programme.title: Tchau, Uggos
programme.desc: Our team battles Rafaela’s mind-controlled crowd. They soon discover that Rafaela’s true plan is to steal the spy plane. Tony deduces that Rafaela isn’t doing all of this for the money - she’s doing it for family.

programme.title: The Giant Haboob
programme.desc: Cleve Kelso breaks Rafaela Moreno and a dangerous, cybernetic prisoner named Matsuo Mori from a high-security ice prison. Back in LA, Tony and the crew experience a major shake-up when Echo gets accepted to Ms. Nowhere’s spy training but Tony is rejected. While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms.

programme.title: Twintuition
programme.desc: When the Twins journey to the Northern Markets to fix their prized mace, they end up stumbling onto a secret project by Viggo and the Dragon Hunters.

programme.title: Blindsided
programme.desc: A huge storm hits Dragon's Edge causing the Dragons to spook and run off but when Astrid is blinded, Hiccup must lead her to Stormfly.

programme.title: Shell Shocked Part 1
programme.desc: Hiccup doesn't know who to trust when Viggo and Ryker each tell him that the other has gone rogue, and is sidetracked when a new dragon attacks.

programme.title: A House Divided
programme.desc: As the countdown to the Eternal Night approaches, Jim is enlightened in the truth about himself.

programme.title: Jimhunters
programme.desc: When Jim's friends discover the Trollhunter has gone through a transformation, Jim will test his newly gained abilities.

programme.title: The Eternal Knight Pt. 1
programme.desc: The Eternal Night covers Arcadia in shadow leading to a long awaited fight between the Trollhunter and Gunmar130226

programme.title: The Gateway to The Desert
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.desc: How is French steel made? Hugo Clement investigates the heart of the heavy industry and reveals its little secrets. An opportunity to discover that a quarter of the greenhouse gas emissions from the French industry is linked to steel production and that this metal is recycled abroad.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Go easy on the hot spices
programme.desc: On the menu: Mexican salsa, harissa grilled pepper soup, maple-glazed salmon, mie goreng.

programme.title: Chateau de la Motte
programme.desc: The Chateau de la Motte, in Chateaurenard, once run by Marguerite de Maleissye, has stood the test of time. After serving as a hospital during the war, it is now privately owned but open to visitors, and features a secret room full of history.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.desc: Chef Leila Albert prepares chocolate and hazelnut cookies.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: The fly
programme.desc: Why has the fly become an insect that everyone detests, so much so that humans have even created a fly whisk to fight it?

programme.title: The first challenge
programme.desc: The priestess from Bali teaches Pokou about the Komians and their role. Shortly afterwards, Pokou turns around and the ground gives way beneath her feet. She finds herself somewhere dark and strange.

programme.title: Toilets
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Here's a butterfly
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Delphine Boulay Case: Terror at the Scout Camp
programme.desc: August 1988. Delphine, 9 years old, leaves with her brother for a scout camp near Deauville. Holidays that will quickly turn into a nightmare. One night, while she was supposed to be sleeping peacefully in her tent, Delphine disappeared. Her lifeless body would be found a few days later.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Meurtres A Pont-Aven
programme.desc: The bodies of two gallery-owners have been found. Murders that seem to echo the disappearance of an artist twenty years earlier. And it is his daughter, Marion, who heads the case, alongside Antoine. What links the murders? Suspicions begin to grow about the way the first case was handled.

programme.title: Foot! (1/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Foot! (2/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Le Chant Du Fleuve
programme.desc: Poetic and patrimonial walk along the Loire. This dreamlike escapade, depicted as a love story between the river and the literature it has inspired, highlights the changing beauty of the Loire shores to the rhythm of the seasons.

programme.title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment S03
programme.desc: Celebrity duos tackle culinary challenges set by a renowned chef.

programme.title: Naagin S07
programme.desc: A Naagin seeks revenge on those who harmed loved ones, as seasons shift, balancing vengeance, love, duty, and life between human world and a realm.

programme.title: Noyontara
programme.desc: Noyontara talks to ghosts and is mocked for it. Her world flips after marrying Surjo, a man who trusts only science, leading to spooky twists and emotional surprises.

programme.title: Naagin S07
programme.desc: A Naagin seeks revenge on those who harmed loved ones, as seasons shift, balancing vengeance, love, duty, and life between human world and a realm.

programme.title: Noyontara
programme.desc: Noyontara talks to ghosts and is mocked for it. Her world flips after marrying Surjo, a man who trusts only science, leading to spooky twists and emotional surprises.

programme.title: Mahadev & Sons
programme.desc: Mahadev is a man of principles, leading a strict household as the family head! But bound to fly high, his children rebel, and a generational clash ensues!

programme.title: Mannat Harr Khushi Paane Ki
programme.desc: Gifted chef Mannat strives for success, unaware her ruthless boss, Aishwarya, is her estranged birth mother, creating a complex and emotional workplace dynamic.

programme.title: Tuu Juliet Jatt Di
programme.desc: Another portrayal of the same heartfelt love journey, highlighting charm, humor, and the small emotional conflicts that slowly build into meaningful relationships.

programme.title: Mangal Lakshmi
programme.desc: Mangal embarks on a quest to find Lakshmi the perfect husband, showcasing the enduring strength of sisterhood, love, trials, and the power of destiny.

programme.title: Do Duniya Ek Dil

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 荣誉:她们的法庭
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】三位律师挚友在专为女性受害者辩护的律所中，面对20年前秘密重现。她们展现钢铁般的团结，直面过去阴影，守护正义与彼此。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】启澄履任主席当日，已打算辞退一妍，一妍以放假为由暂时度过危机。一妍与AKL银行新任总裁戴德桥见面，提出惊人的合作建议。国际刑警指，坠机事件很可能不是意外。明塱集团爆出丑闻，股价大跌，同时遭到AKL银行催逼还款。启澄被迫将持有的股份「以股抵债」，AKL银行不费吹灰之力就成了大股东之一。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 基俊与慧云婚期已定，基俊前女友许安妮声称怀有基俊骨肉；慧云没动摇，仍要与基俊结婚。安妮被家人强制送回外国，满月设法助她逃脱时遇上成风，二人联手帮安妮举行记招公开怀孕一事，却遭昊天阻挠。成风事败向老板卓世祺汇报，世祺再作盘算。成风好奇满月为何与蒋家作对，满月避而不谈。哲贤助手邝文海对满月起疑，命莫振强追查。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍成功进入董事会之外，路沙马集团主席方欣亦成为新董事；方欣更直接向一妍宣战。一妍再次要求以珈、丽雪入董事会，惟以珈仍坚决拒绝。明塱医院爆出医疗事故，丽雪的弟弟陈宇泽牵涉其中。丽雪帮忙拆局时，发现事件背后大有文章……以珈心系继女王海淳的前途，希望海淳按照启聪遗愿，前赴英国升读大学，但海淳坚拒不从，二人闹翻。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 樊如晦试图陷害叶凌霜，但叶凌霜机智应对，反使樊如晦计划落空。同时，彧修明利用叶凌霜的才智，成功让樊如晦填补国库的空缺。在夜北，七海伶和界诸婴回到部落，却接到彧修明的赐婚圣旨，引发族人的误解和不满。另一方面，冷天曦在月圆之夜受月噬影响失控，叶凌霜采取放血的方法帮助她缓解疼痛。

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW

Beginning his career in Paraguay, the midfielder earned a move to Inter Miami, where he developed his game alongside some of football's biggest names such as Lionel Messi. programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: In the heart of Ecuador, we sit down with Antonio Valencia as he reflects on an extraordinary journey from humble beginnings to the grand stages of world football. Against the backdrop of the streets and stadiums that shaped him, he recounts his rise through adversity, his explosive emergence in the Premier League with Wigan, and his evolution into a title-winning, Champions League-chasing leader at Manchester United.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the second of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Gary Neville. From his journey from Class of '92 prodigy to Premier League Hall of Fame icon, he talks us through the moments that defined his legacy at Manchester United. A story on one of the league's most influential right-backs and a leader whose impact still shapes English football today.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS
programme.desc: With 481 Premier League appearances and five titles - Michael Carrick is a Premier League icon. programme.title: 东张西望

programme.title: 一周星星
programme.desc: 访谈节目《一周星星》，每集邀请星级艺人、界别名人，与区永权、许文轩、王镇泉等娱乐主播，分享新近工作企划，谈论电影、电视、演唱会相关的特别话题，尤其是网民与圈中朋友关心热议的人和事！

programme.title: 美食新闻周报
programme.desc: 黄嘉雯、倪嘉雯、伍倩彤等美食主播、主持，紧贴最新美食潮流，从不同平台网罗超人气餐厅消息，主持亲自试食，带来真实食评。节目精选《美食新闻报道》介绍的多间餐厅，力推当中招牌美食，并会速递美食优惠，让观众实时掌握最滋味、抵食的饮食情报。

programme.title: 流行经典50年

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 市井豪门

programme.title: 危险人物

programme.title: 唐人街探案2
programme.desc: 唐仁（王宝强饰）为巨额奖金欺骗秦风（刘昊然饰）到纽约参加世界名侦探大赛，比赛的内容是寻找杀害纽约唐人街教父七叔的孙子的凶手。两人再次组合侦破案件，并冒着生命危险闹翻纽约。

programme.title: 长相思第一季

programme.title: The Crew And Skye Build A Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: Skye visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay when their construction project needs some aerial support. But when Speed Meister tries to beat the pups to finish the job, Skye, Rubble, and the rest of the crew jump into rescue mode to save the day!

programme.title: The Crew Builds Mr. Ducky-Doo A Special Diving Board / The Crew Builds A Rainwater Tank
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: Troll Jelly / Catch That Kitty
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help the Grumples make troll jelly before the Grumpy Old Troll's snack time. / Dora and Boots have to recover El Gatito Magico and put it in its special place so all the friends stop acting like a cat.

programme.title: Adventures In Plantsitting / Andrea the Alebrije
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take care of baby flowers Bouncy Blue, Dizzy Daisy, and Baby Rosette so Isa can attend a royal tea party. / Dora and Boots help baby Andrea find the magical leaf so she can receive her Alebrije powers and take care of the rainforest.

programme.title: Barbazoo Can't Say ''No'' / The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: The Seven Foods / The Perfect Portrait
programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.title: Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the "BAM".

programme.title: Princess For A Day / Barbabeau's Adventure
programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Ballpark / The Crew Builds A Surf Bridge
programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove! // Surf's up for Rubble & Crew! Well, if they can get over the super hot sand, it is.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Reuse-It Station / The Crew Builds A Duck Bridge
programme.desc: When Speed Meister builds his own station for reusing trash, the pups have to clean up the mess all over Builder Cove. // After a baby duckling follows them home, Rubble & Crew use their construction know-how to bring the duckling back to its home.

programme.title: Pups Save a Monkey / Pups Save a Hoot
programme.desc: When Mandy the monkey escapes from her cage on the train, Ryder and the PAW Patrol are lead on a wild chase! // During a bad wind storm, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to save an Owl trapped in a blown over tree and reunite her baby.

programme.title: Pups Save a Bat / Pups Save a Toof
programme.desc: A baby Bat decides to take a nap hanging from the Town Hall's bell and Mayor Goodway can't ring it. // Alex is afraid to go to the dentist, so Chase and the PAW Patrol work together to show Alex that fears can be overcome.

programme.title: Bada-Bam / The Barbamartians
programme.desc: Barbabright captured a melody from Mars. The Barbapapas build a rocket to go to the red planet. // While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: Boris / Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: Tidy
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Astropumpkin
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy try to grow the biggest Moon Pumpkin they can.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Train Station / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Sign
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the first train station in Builder Cove just in time to welcome Farmer Zoe's new cow Mooreen. // Popstar Sierra Sparkle is moving to Builder Cove! But when the pups plan a surprise greeting, Speed Meister makes a plan of his own.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Mini Golf Course/The Crew Builds A Butterfly Garden
programme.desc: When a family of bunnies hops onto the soccer field, Rubble & Crew use their skills to build a new sport... Bunny Ball! // After the pups discover a new kind of butterfly, it flutters away! Will a giant butterfly garden help bring it back?

programme.title: Octo-Swiper / Tudos Juntos
programme.desc: Dora stops a frantic octopus Swiper and saves the Pearl Day Party! // Dora meets Raquel the Rock Lobster and helps her get the missing instruments back in time to play at the big music show!

programme.title: The Trophy Chase
programme.desc: The Championship Race is about to start, and all the fastest trucks in town are ready to roll! But when Crusher steals the trophy before the race even begins, it's up to Blaze and his friends to get it back in time.

programme.title: Borrower Daisy / Can Do Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and Daisy try to figure out which of her friends borrowed her game and didn't return it. // A perfect "Step-Mother's" day for Maggie all depends on Daisy and Mr. Crocodile finding a can opener.

programme.title: The Treasure Hunt / Going into the Wild
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: Paramedic Power
programme.desc: When Blaze's friends need help, Ambulance Blaze, Paramedic AJ and Paramedic Gabby have all the tools they need to save the day!

programme.title: The Snowflake Games
programme.desc: It's a head-to-head showdown when Blaze and Crusher enter... The Snowflake Games! Who will win the most winter sports and receive the prized Snowflake Medal?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Solar Farm
programme.desc: When power problems shut down Sierra Sparkle's show, the pups hop in their big vehicles to turn the power back on.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A School / The Crew Builds A Waterway
programme.desc: It's the first day of school in Builder Cove... if Rubble & Crew can finish the building in time! / The pups need a construction solution to save Farmer Zoe's crops and to keep Crunchy the beaver from taking all the water!

programme.title: Pups Save The Mustache / Pups Save the Funhouse
programme.desc: The Pups must help to find Mayor Humdinger's mustache after he accidentally shaves it off before it's about to be on the cover of a magazine. // When a carnival train gets stuck in a tunnel, it results in a mountainside funhouse-style wild ride.

programme.title: Pups Save The Hiding Elephants / Pups Save a Yodeler
programme.desc: Elephants become trapped in the Monkey Temple after a bee frightens them away from their watering hole. // When Wingnut runs away from wolves that are attracted to his yodeling, he ends up trapped in a canyon. The Paw Patrol has to hurry to save him.

programme.title: The Alebrije Adventure / Let's Get A Paleta
programme.desc: Ale the Alebrije asks Dora for her help! The Alebrije tree is wilting, so it's up to Dora to find its rainbow water. // On a super hot day, everyone wants paleta, but Val's paleta truck is stuck! Dora goes to rescue her and get paletas for everyone.

programme.title: Troll Jelly
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help the Grumples make troll jelly before the Grumpy Old Troll's snack time.

programme.title: Astropumpkin
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy try to grow the biggest Moon Pumpkin they can.

programme.title: Dinerstore
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy help out at the DinerStore.

programme.title: Hat
programme.desc: Grandma gives Tim a hat she made herself, unfortunately it keeps getting in the way.

programme.title: Fruit
programme.desc: It is fruit day at the supermarket, and Miss Rabbit is making fruit smoothies. Everyone is picking their favourite fruits to blend. George gets a special 'dinosaur' juice, to make him big and strong. Roar!

programme.title: George's Balloon
programme.desc: George is finding it difficult to keep hold of his big balloon. Can anyone stop it from flying off to the moon?

programme.title: Pirate Treasure
programme.desc: Pirate Peppa and friends put together a chest of treasure and bury it in a marked spot. Soon Pedro needs to follow the trail as he realises he has lost something.

programme.title: Grampy Rabbit in Space
programme.desc: Grampy Rabbit visits Peppa's playgroup to talk about space rockets. The talk is going very well until suddenly Grampy Rabbit looses his voice. Can Doctor Brown Bear get him talking again?

programme.title: Mirrors
programme.desc: George has fun looking at himself in the mirror. Peppa and George try to find other shiny things to see themselves in.

programme.title: Pedro is Late
programme.desc: The playgroup is going on a trip to the museum. Everyone, is on the bus ready to go. But where is Pedro Pony?

programme.title: Garden Games
programme.desc: Peppa and Suzy have nothing to do, and are bored. Daddy Pig finds them an old box of garden games to play with. But not all the games are easy for little George.

programme.title: Going Boating
programme.desc: Everyone has come to the lake to go boating, Miss Rabbit has all sorts of boats for hire. All the families have a race and Daddy Pig wishes he hadn't picked a boat which has to be peddled.

programme.title: Mr Bull in a China Shop
programme.desc: While enjoying a tea break, Mr Bull accidentally breaks his delicate teapot. He takes the pieces to Miss Rabbit in the hope that she can mend it.

programme.title: Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the "BAM".

programme.title: Princess For A Day / Barbabeau's Adventure
programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.title: Lucky Croc / Sleepover Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile search for a lucky item to help them win a bike raffle. // When Mr. Crocodile can't fall asleep at his first sleepover, Daisy helps him figure out why.

programme.title: Zeg and the Egg
programme.desc: Zeg is out smashing things with Blaze and AJ when he finds a tiny dinosaur egg. Now the three friends must embark on an epic journey across a prehistoric landscape to return the egg to its Truckodactyl mother.

programme.title: Gasquatch
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are deep in the woods when they discover and befriend a mud-loving monster truck named Gasquatch. Now, they must set out on an epic adventure to bring their new friend to Mud Fest... the muddiest party of all time.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Solar Farm
programme.desc: When power problems shut down Sierra Sparkle's show, the pups hop in their big vehicles to turn the power back on.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Gym / The Crew Puts On A Construction Show
programme.desc: Coach Karima asks Rubble & Crew to build a gym for the gymnastics show. But when the beam is too high for Lily, it's up to the pups to save the day.//When a traveling show can't get to Builder Cove, Rubble & Crew decides to build a show of their own!

programme.title: Pups Save the Chalk Art / Pups Save a Hot Potato
programme.desc: The Mini Patrol and the Pups race to the rescue to save a local mural before the rain comes. // Farmer Al and Yumi find out their garden is full of holes and their one of a kind potato is missing. Now the pups must find the potato thief!

programme.title: Pups Save Little Hairy / Pups Save a Kooky Klimber
programme.desc: Big Hairy's little brother falls into a hole and Tracker gets carried away by Big Hairy. It's time for a Jungle Rescue! // Daring Danny tries extreme rock climbing with Ace Sorenson. It's up to the Paw Patrol to save the duo.

programme.title: Boris / Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: Making Bread / From One Pit to Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: Rocket Race / Magic / Parents
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother. // Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine. // The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: Ratoncito Perez / The Berry Hungry Caterpillar
programme.desc: Dora helps Ratoncito Perez fix his magic toothbrush wand so she can get a gift for her missing tooth. // Dora meets Carlos, a giant caterpillar who wants to be a butterfly! They need to find some butterberries that will help him transform.

programme.title: Unicornasaurus / The Grumple Games
programme.desc: Dora helps Benny and Uni the Unicornasaurus get their magic paintbrush back so he can be reunited with his pet, Bunnicorn. // Dora teams up with Hearty the Grumple so she can finally compete in the Grumple Games.

programme.title: Polly Parrot
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig's house, and meet their new parrot, Polly.

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Peppa and George decide to play a game of hide and seek.

programme.title: The Playgroup
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going to daycare. It's George's first day at daycare, and he shows the class his interest in dinosaurs.

programme.title: Mummy Pig at Work
programme.desc: Peppa accidentally crashes Mummy Pig's computer, so Daddy Pig tries to fix it.

programme.title: Piggy in the Middle
programme.desc: Peppa teaches George how to catch a ball, and later, they play Monkey in the Middle with Mummy Pig.

programme.title: Daddy Loses his Glasses
programme.desc: Daddy Pig is a little upset because he lost his glasses, so Peppa and George try to find them.

programme.title: Gardening
programme.desc: Peppa and George enjoy helping Grandpa Pig plant seeds in his garden.

programme.title: Ninja Soup
programme.desc: Blackbelt isn't the only Ninja Master in his family- his Grandma Ninja has awesome moves too! But when she gets a nasty cold, Blaze, AJ and Blackbelt set out to make the most powerful medicine there is: Ninja Soup!

programme.title: Pups Save a Pizza / Pups Save Skye
programme.desc: Alex and Mr. Porter are delivering pizza dough for a big party when the van spins out of control. Pups to the rescue! // Skye is on her way to Jake's Mountain when she crash lands in the snow. Ryder calls Everest to save the day!

programme.title: Pups Save a Humsquatch
programme.desc: Travelling Travis yelps for help when he finds a mysterious creature in trouble. The PAW Patrol heads to Foggy Bottom to save a Humsquatch

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Solar Farm
programme.desc: When power problems shut down Sierra Sparkle's show, the pups hop in their big vehicles to turn the power back on.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Ice Cream Maker
programme.desc: Rubble and the pups help Cafe Carl make enough ice cream for everyone! If Speed Meister doesn't get in the way...

programme.title: Buzzy Croc / Dream House
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile worries he'll be caught between his old best friend Buzzy and his new best friend Daisy. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile's simple treehouse gets complicated when they try to add space for all their friends.

programme.title: The Seven Foods / The Perfect Portrait
programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 危险人物
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】初出茅庐的小混混阿杰与好友在江湖闯荡，却因意外卷入黑帮纷争。在血雨腥风中，兄弟情义与江湖道义面临着残酷的考验，一场致命的追逐就此展开。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 中餐厅7
programme.desc: 本季《中餐厅》将由几位嘉宾组成双档营业小分队，再度出海营业，在匈牙利开设中餐厅，以美好、美味打造丝路飘香 ，展开一场的中华美食出海之旅。

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 你好，星期六
programme.desc: 节目通过新奇多样的环节设置和兼具知识性、趣味性的创意内容，深度展现明星艺能。

programme.title: 唐人街探案2
programme.desc: 唐仁（王宝强饰）为巨额奖金欺骗秦风（刘昊然饰）到纽约参加世界名侦探大赛，比赛的内容是寻找杀害纽约唐人街教父七叔的孙子的凶手。两人再次组合侦破案件，并冒着生命危险闹翻纽约。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 花心大少
programme.desc: 严钱声是一名自恃追女高手的富家花花公子，被母亲劝喻要成家立室。他在寻找生命中的女主角时，被两个追女高手挑战。到底他最后能否找到心中最爱?

programme.title: 大上海
programme.desc: 黑帮头目成大器步步攀升至权力巅峰，却深陷两名女子的情感纠葛与特务机关的阴谋算计，并在战争逼近的威胁下挣扎求生。

programme.title: 煞面迷影
programme.desc: 当年轻母亲为女儿莫名失踪而苦恼时，一连串怪异的事件接踵而至。这都可能与二十年前的意外亡魂为复仇归来有关...

programme.title: 激战
programme.desc: 曾经叱咤世界拳坛的拳王程辉，在澳门遇见了热血青年思齐。随着他训练思齐备战即将举行的混合格斗赛，程辉不仅重燃了对拳击的热爱，还重新找回了对生命的热情，并更加珍惜那些在生命中真正重要的人。

programme.title: 千王斗千霸
programme.desc: 一位名震千坛的千王之王及其伙伴被政府雇用，以调查一名赌术了得的上海大亨。当局怀疑他藉开赌场掩饰其在上海情报机关的日本千霸身份。

programme.title: 白蛇传说
programme.desc: 这部奇幻动作片改编自中国经典传说《白蛇传》，讲述郎中许仙爱上化身为女子的千年白蛇。白蛇的真实身份被揭露后，高僧法海为守护人类与超自然力量之间的平衡，不得不挺身而出，展开一场惊心动魄的对决。

programme.title: 裂战
programme.desc: 为了对抗温室效应，女科学家颜欣培育出超级橡胶种子，前往一个荒岛进行种植，希望将那里改变为一片欣欣向荣的新土地。然而，她的前夫决定在这趟危险的旅程中保护她，与她结伴同行。抵达后，他们面临接连不断的冲突，并遇上当地的贩毒组织，一场生死对决随即展开。

programme.title: 夜守
programme.desc: 在一次车祸后失忆的王人杰找到夜间警卫的工作。午夜，他准时抵达废弃的大厦上班，却发现三只冤魂如约而至，并揭发了一场复仇计画。究竟这是命运的安排还是邪灵的诅咒？

programme.title: 中华英雄
programme.desc: 1913年，华英雄惨遭灭门，愤然流亡美国。妻子洁瑜怀孕寻夫，二人异乡重逢。孰料龙凤胎出生当夜，中华楼遭敌纵火，洁瑜惨死、女婴被掳。十六年后，子华剑雄踏上寻父之路，华英雄则于自由女神像顶，与宿敌无敌展开生死决战。

programme.title: 曼谷风云
programme.desc: 地下拳手林枫因拒绝替曼谷黑帮打黑拳，因此被追杀。他虽成功逃脱，却失去记忆。当林枫开展其新生活时，却被黑帮发现行踪，并找来绝顶打手对付他。期间林枫忽然回复记忆，并誓要将黑帮歼灭。

programme.title: 僵尸叔叔
programme.desc: 偏僻山间，一僧一道比邻而居。和尚（午马 饰）随和开朗，更有一女徒菁菁（李丽珍 饰）玲珑可爱；道士（陈友 饰）古板严厉，而徒弟嘉乐（钱嘉乐 饰）却鬼马顽皮。性格不同的两个师傅口角不断，大斗其法，两个冤家徒弟也搞笑连连，笑料频出。

programme.title: 冰封侠重生之门
programme.desc: 明朝锦衣卫贺英被诬陷为弑君逆贼，三位结义兄弟奉命追杀。在生死对决之际，四人意外被冰封于时空裂隙。四百年后，他们在现代香港苏醒。一场跨越时代的宿命之战，于陌生都市再度引爆。

programme.title: 天官赐福
programme.desc: 康熙少年嗣位，太后急欲替他完婚，遂选纳大臣之女纳兰琼瑶为妃，但琼瑶为争取婚姻自由离家出走，康熙亦乐得不用成婚。后来康熙微服下江南，却偶遇女扮男装的琼瑶...

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 一步一脚印 发现新台湾
programme.desc: 台湾到处有充满创意、认真工作的人们，「一步一脚印，发现新台湾」将呈现出真实而全面的新台湾精神。

programme.title: 拜托ATM

programme.desc: 您对自己的身体了解多少？怎么样吃才能吃出健康和美丽？网络上的健康秘方到底是真是假？主持人郑凯云、江坤俊医师与韦汝将为您的健康把关！

programme.title: 女人我最大
programme.desc: 《女人我最大》节目内容包罗万象，从各行各业的奇特文化；社会异象到生活新鲜事，美艳的主持人蓝心湄将带领观众一起探讨及解开谜团。

programme.title: 地球黄金线
programme.desc: 「地球黄金线」首创专业汽车实境秀，提共最实用的市售车评比、最深入的汽车经典赏析、最夯的车坛趋势，解析汽车科新风貌。

programme.title: 食尚玩家 疯狂总部
programme.desc: 节目设下最疯狂的任务，主持群将进行任务解锁，品尝在地美食。

programme.title: 国民大会
programme.desc: 「国民大会」从台湾的人、台湾的事，畅谈台湾的故事，以深入浅出，轻松幽默的不同面向解读社会时事的氛围。

programme.title: FOCUS全球新闻
programme.desc: 聚焦全球大事，从华府到北京，从欧美到亚非，从政治、经济到科技与文化，透过深度而完整的报导，带领观众进入关键事件的核心，补给面向世界的知识能量，掌握国际发展趋势。

programme.title: 最前线新闻
